subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Countenance! Thy name hath indeed appeared before the Wronged One, and He hath revealed unto thee that which God hath ordained as a sign [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا ایها الناظر الی الوجه قد حضر اسمک لدی المظلوم و انزل لک ما جعله الله آیه
subcodes.subjects: @prophecy and fulfillment, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @exhortations and counsels, @call to action, @praise and encouragement
